hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('file_path',''); checks={'apps/client':'pnpm --filter @contourlab/client typecheck 2>&1','apps/api':'dotnet build apps/api/api.csproj --no-restore -v q 2>&1','packages/shared-types':'pnpm --filter @contourlab/shared-types typecheck 2>&1'}; [subprocess.run(cmd,shell=True) for prefix,cmd in checks.items() if p.startswith(prefix)]" 2>/dev/null || true
